product_name: Hennessy Cognac Paradis
desc: An ultra-premium blend of aged eaux-de-vie from Hennessy, known for its profound complexity, smooth texture, and rich aromatic profile with notes of dried fruits, floral undertones, and subtle spices.

product_name: Hennessy Cognac Paradis Imperial

product_name: Hennessy Cognac Richard

product_name: Hennessy Cognac VS

product_name: Hennessy X.O

product_name: Hibiki 21 Years Old Japanese Whisky
desc: A prestigious blended Japanese whisky, meticulously crafted and aged for a minimum of 21 years. It offers a complex bouquet of dried fruit, spice, and sandalwood, with a rich, mellow palate and a long, elegant finish.

product_name: Hibiki 30 Year Old Japanese Whisky
desc: Hibiki 30 Year Old Japanese Whisky is a rare, prestigious blend from Suntory. Aged for three decades, it offers profound complexity with notes of dried apricot, honey, sandalwood, and a lingering, elegant finish.

product_name: Hibiki Harmony

product_name: High Plains Straight Rye Whiskey

product_name: High West Bourbon Whiskey

product_name: High West Mountain Gin

product_name: High West Rendezvous Rye Whiskey

product_name: Jameson Original Irish Whiskey

product_name: Jameson Original Irish Whiskey

desc: Potent Jamaican white overproof rum, known for its high alcohol content and clear, robust flavor profile. Essential for classic Caribbean cocktails and punches, delivering a strong base.

product_name: Writers' Tears Copper Pot Irish Whiskey
desc: A unique blend of triple-distilled single pot still and single malt Irish whiskeys, crafted in copper pots. Matured in American oak bourbon casks, it offers a smooth profile with notes of fruit, honey, and spice.

product_name: Writers' Tears Double Oak Blended Irish Whiskey
desc: A sophisticated Blended Irish Whiskey from Writers' Tears, matured in both American and French oak for enhanced depth and complexity. Offers a smooth, sweet profile with notes of honey, fruit, and spice.

product_name: Writers' Tears Japanese Mizunara Cask Finish Irish Whiskey
desc: Writers' Tears Japanese Mizunara Cask Finish Irish Whiskey is an Irish whiskey finished in rare Japanese Mizunara oak casks. This unique finishing imparts distinctive notes of sandalwood, coconut, and exotic spices, creating a complex and aromatic profile.

product_name: Writers' Tears Marsala Cask Finish Irish Whiskey
desc: A unique Irish Whiskey from Writers' Tears, finished in Marsala wine casks. This process imparts rich, sweet, and nutty notes, offering a distinct and complex flavor profile.

product_name: Writers' Tears Red Head Irish Whiskey
desc: Writers' Tears Red Head is an Irish whiskey matured in Oloroso Sherry casks, offering rich fruit notes, a spicy character, and a smooth, elegant finish. A distinctive expression from the brand.

product_name: Wyoming Whiskey Double Cask Bourbon
desc: A premium bourbon whiskey featuring a unique double cask maturation process, where the spirit is aged in two distinct types of barrels to develop enhanced depth and complexity in its flavor profile.

product_name: Wyoming Whiskey Outryder American Straight Whiskey
desc: Wyoming Whiskey Outryder is an American Straight Whiskey, known for its unique blend of straight rye and straight bourbon. Aged in new charred oak, it offers a complex profile with notes of spice, fruit, and oak, reflecting its Wyoming origins.

product_name: Yellow Rose Distilling Harris County Bourbon Whiskey
desc: Yellow Rose Distilling Harris County Bourbon Whiskey is a small-batch bourbon from Texas. Crafted with a high-corn mash bill and aged in new charred oak barrels, it offers rich notes of caramel, vanilla, and oak spice.

product_name: Yellow Rose Distilling Outlaw Bourbon Whiskey
desc: Yellow Rose Distilling's Outlaw Bourbon Whiskey is a small-batch American bourbon, distinctively crafted in Texas. Aged in new charred oak barrels, it offers rich notes of caramel, vanilla, and oak, with a smooth, robust finish.

product_name: Yellow Spot 12 Years Old Single Pot Still Irish Whiskey
desc: A premium Irish whiskey, triple distilled in a single pot still. Aged for 12 years, it offers a rich and complex palate with notes of fruit, spice, and oak, characteristic of traditional Irish maturation.

product_name: Yellowstone 101 Proof Bourbon
desc: A robust American bourbon whiskey, aged in new charred oak barrels, showcasing a bold flavor profile at 101 proof. Crafted with a mash bill of at least 51% corn.

product_name: Yellowstone 101 Proof Bourbon
desc: A robust Kentucky straight bourbon whiskey, bottled at 101 proof for a bolder flavor profile. Matured in new charred oak barrels, it offers notes of caramel, vanilla, and oak with a spicy finish.

product_name: Yellowstone American Single Malt Whiskey
desc: Yellowstone American Single Malt Whiskey is crafted from 100% malted barley and aged in new charred oak barrels, offering a distinctive profile with notes of caramel, vanilla, and dried fruit, characteristic of American single malts.

product_name: Yellowstone Select Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whiskey
desc: Yellowstone Select Kentucky Straight Bourbon Whiskey is a premium American spirit, distilled and aged in Kentucky. This straight bourbon offers a complex profile with notes of caramel, vanilla, and oak, culminating in a smooth, satisfying finish for enthusiasts.

product_name: Yellowstone Single Barrel Bourbon Whiskey
desc: Yellowstone Single Barrel Bourbon Whiskey is a premium American spirit, drawn from individual barrels to offer a unique and distinct flavor profile with rich notes of caramel, vanilla, and oak.

product_name: Yellowstone Toasted Bourbon Special Finishes Collection
desc: Yellowstone Toasted Bourbon is a Kentucky straight bourbon featuring a special finishing process in toasted barrels, enhancing its profile with notes of vanilla, caramel, and oak spice. Part of a limited collection.

product_name: Zaya 16 Year Old Grand Reserva Rum
desc: Zaya 16 Year Old Grand Reserva Rum is a super-premium aged rum, masterfully crafted from a blend of rums matured for 16 years. It offers a rich, complex flavor profile with prominent notes of vanilla, caramel, and baking spices, ideal for discerning palates.
